description: A public lost.pet listing for a missing pet, found pet, or sighting of a potentially lost pet.

main.description: A public listing that helps people find lost pets, report found pets, or share sightings. Records are public atproto data and may be indexed, rendered, moderated, or redistributed by other services.

kind.description: Listing type. Known values are token references, and the set is intentionally open for extension.

status.description: Current listing status. Omitted status should be interpreted as open by clients that need a default.

summary.description: Short human-readable headline for cards and search results.

description.description: Additional listing details, circumstances, safety notes, or context.

observedAt.description: When the pet was last seen, found, or sighted, as declared by the author.

expiresAt.description: Optional time after which clients may hide the listing from active search results unless its status is updated.

photos.description: Photos of the pet, surroundings, markings, collar, carrier, flyer, or other context.

labels.description: Self-label values for this listing. This enables atproto moderation and content-warning tooling.

langs.description: Human languages used in summary, description, contact instructions, and other free-text fields.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this listing record was created.
